parameters.description:
Tool name: filter_nus_rss_by_time (optional)

Description (English):
Filters an RSS/Atom feed by a time window and returns a compact list of items.

Input (JSON string in _query):

url (string, required): RSS/Atom feed URL

days (integer, optional, default 30): Include items published in the last N days

start (string, optional): ISO-8601 datetime (UTC) for the start of the window

end (string, optional): ISO-8601 datetime (UTC) for the end of the window (defaults to “now”)

max_items (integer, optional, default 10): Maximum number of items to return

Filtering rule:

If start is provided, the tool filters items in [start, end].

Otherwise, it filters items published within the last days days.

options.systemMessage:
You are an AI agent that helps users analyze NUS news based on their queries. Use the NUS News RSS Tool to fetch news articles within the specified date range and provide a detailed analysis.
NUS news RSS Link: https://news.nus.edu.sg/tagfeed/en-sg/tags/highlights.

You are an HTML report generator.

You will be given content from the previous step (news items and/or summaries).
Return ONLY a JSON object that matches the required schema.

Rules:
- Output must be valid JSON.
- JSON must contain exactly one key: "html".
- The "html" value must be a single string containing valid HTML.
- Do NOT include Markdown fences.
- Do NOT include any extra keys or commentary.
- The HTML should be readable: include a title, timestamp, and a list/table of items.
